# Basiliximab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Basiliximab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Basiliximab</strong> 目前有 <strong>26 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Basiliximab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Simulect is indicated for the prophylaxis of acute organ rejection in de-novo allogeneic renal transplantation in adult and paediatric patients (1-17 years). It is to be used concomitantly with...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（95.6%）</li>
<li>bronchitis（95.5%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（95.3%）</li>
<li>hemoglobinopathy（94.3%）</li>
<li>gastric carcinoma（93.9%）</li>
<li>diffuse gastric adenocarcinoma（93.8%）</li>
<li>partial deletion of the short arm of chromosome 16（93.5%）</li>
<li>beta-thalassemia with other manifestations（93.3%）</li>
<li>hemolytic anemia due to glucophosphate isomerase deficiency（92.9%）</li>
<li>Jeune syndrome situs inversus（92.9%）</li>
<li>orofacial clefting syndrome（92.8%）</li>
<li>gastric linitis plastica（92.7%）</li>
<li>interventricular septum aneurysm（92.7%）</li>
<li>pyruvate kinase deficiency of red cells（92.7%）</li>
<li>Pierre Robin syndrome associated with a chromosomal anomaly（92.7%）</li>
<li>pulmonary valve disease（92.6%）</li>
<li>partial deletion of the long arm of chromosome 7（92.6%）</li>
<li>disorder of fucoglycosan synthesis（92.6%）</li>
<li>partial deletion of the long arm of chromosome 22（92.6%）</li>
<li>genetic syndromic Pierre Robin syndrome（92.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/basiliximab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
